stemHtml: When engaged, which of the following is a potential threat or limitation of an autothrust system?

options.a: In turbulence, engine limits may be exceeded due to rapid thrust variations.
options.b: Speed cannot be maintained if the selected speed exceeds the aircraft’s performance capability.
options.c: Autothrust may command thrust beyond certified engine limits during climb.
options.d: Autothrust always guarantees the selected speed regardless of aircraft mass or altitude.
